うぅ……着替えてみたけど……<br>これ、露出が多くて恥ずかしいな……:
*whimper*... I changed clothes, but... this is so revealing, it's
embarrassing...
娼館衣装に身を包んだヒマリは、<br>鏡の前で頬を赤らめていた。:
Himari, dressed in the brothel outfit, was blushing in front of the
mirror.
って、このくらいで恥ずかしがってちゃだめ……だよね。<br>しれーかんのために娼:
I mean, I can't be embarrassed by this... right? I decided to work at
the brothel for Commander, so I have to do my best...!
よし……行こう……。<br>お客さん――いるのかな？: Alright... let's go... Are there any customers, I wonder?
ヒマリが現れると、酒場に集まっていた男たちから<br>わぁっ！ と歓声が上がった:
When Himari appeared, cheers of 'Waaah!' rose from the men
gathered in the tavern.
これは、売れっ子間違いなしだ……！！: She's sure to be a huge hit...!
その後、兵士たちは誰がヒマリに相手してもらうのか、協議を始める。<br>一番手を:
The soldiers' negotiation over who'd be Himari's first customer grew
so heated it nearly started a fight.
あ、あの……。<br>喧嘩、ダメ……仲良くして？: Um... Please don't fight... Get along, okay?
はい！！ と素直に返事をする兵士たち。<br>彼らは平和的に、じゃんけんで順番を:
The soldiers obediently replied, 'Yes!' Then they peacefully decided
the order with rock-paper-scissors. And then—
